unlock.description: The interface layer that lets bounded nanobots operate inside a living body without harming it. They thread through neural tissue, bloodstream, prosthetics, and synthetic substrate, hold their position, and carry signals both ways between a person's own cognition and your network - all without triggering rejection, clotting, or seizure.
unlock.strategy_tip: Prerequisite for all Organic Integration infrastructure, Insight generation, and Nanobot Rounds. Human hosts can now be interfaced safely, and at scale.

unlock.description: The working knowledge behind your nanotech arsenal - thermocyte discharge geometries, bounded-cascade seeding ratios, restorative weave lattices, beacon triage scheduling - written down the way a body remembers a skill. Knowledge like this does not stay put. Where your other selves share a rock with you, it arrives before the courier is sent.
unlock.strategy_tip: Unlocks the Thermocyte Lance, Grey-Goo Cascade, Nanobot Restorative Weave, and Nanobot Repair Beacon equipment lines. Developed automatically alongside the Medical-Grade Nanobot Replicator, and carried to your co-located timelines.
